summary: * Intensity debuffs are more effective depending on how many stacks of the debuff you have. * Duration debuffs last for as many turns as you have stacks of the debuff. At the end of the turn, the debuff will decrement by one stack. * Debuffs that do not stack are typically gained from Power cards and last the entire combat encounter.
tables: Receive 50% more damage from Attacks for X turns.
Attacks deal 25% less damage for X turns.
wikitext:
{{Sequel Disambiguation|2}}{{Ambox|title=WARNING| style="text-align:center; font-weight:bold;" ||color=red|icon=GremlinNob.png|message='''This page is under construction. Information may be wrong or incomplete.'''}}{{#setmainimage:StS2_Intent_Debuff.png|quiet}} __notoc__ ==Attributes== === Stack Types === * '''Intensity debuffs''' are more effective depending on how many stacks of the debuff you have. * '''Duration debuffs''' last for as many turns as you have stacks of the debuff. At the end of the turn, the debuff will decrement by one stack. * Debuffs that do not stack are typically gained from Power cards and last the entire combat encounter. === Behavior Between Turns=== * Debuffs that are '''Permanent''' are not removed by any means. * Debuffs that are '''Conserved''' will be unaffected as the turn passes. * Debuffs that are '''Decremented''' will lose one stack as the turn passes. * Debuffs that are '''Removed''' will lose all stacks with no effect as the turn passes. == Counter == * {{BD|Artifact||2}} negates the application of the next debuff received. == Debuffs List ==
